justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent accurately understood and processed all temporal expressions provided by the user, including specific dates and time ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively handled unavailability by offering alternative dates and then successfully found a suitable slot on the user's preferred alternative date.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent gathering all necessary information and booking the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the desired appointment.
